mapper.select: SELECT id, provider, provider_user_id, nickname, bio, profile_image_url, status, refresh_token, refresh_token_expires_at, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE provider = #{provider} AND provider_user_id = #{providerUserId}
SELECT id, provider, provider_user_id, nickname, bio, profile_image_url, status, refresh_token, refresh_token_expires_at, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (provider, provider_user_id, status) VALUES (#{provider}, #{providerUserId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET refresh_token = NULL, refresh_token_expires_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
